Iran conventional: Kharg Island oil hub struck by US jets, Iran threatens Ford carrier group. Israel-Lebanon: simultaneous strikes on Tehran + Beirut, ground ops continue. latest_news.headline: US Embassy Baghdad struck by drones and rockets
latest_news.text: At least 5 drones and rockets fired at US Embassy in Baghdad. Second major attack on embassy. Iran-backed militia escalation in Iraq.

latest_news.headline: Another tanker struck off UAE coast
latest_news.text: Tanker struck by unknown projectile while anchored east of UAE. Multiple vessels now hit in Gulf waters.

latest_news.headline: Iranian missile 'metres' from Netanyahu's office
latest_news.text: Iranian missile struck positions 'a few metres' from Israeli PM Netanyahu's office in central Jerusalem. IRGC previously vowed to 'hunt down' Netanyahu.

latest_news.headline: Israel deploys MORE troops to Lebanon
latest_news.text: IDF posts on X confirming deployment of additional troops to Lebanon. Ground operations expanding beyond 'limited' scope.

latest_news.headline: IMO: naval escorts no guarantee for ship safety
latest_news.text: International Maritime Organization warns naval escorts cannot guarantee safety of ships in Strait of Hormuz - undermines Trump's coalition plan.

latest_news.headline: Iraq brokering Hormuz passage with Iran
latest_news.text: Iraq oil minister says Baghdad in contact with Iran to allow some tankers through Hormuz. Also working to resume Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline to Turkey.

latest_news.headline: 70 Israelis hospitalized in last 24 hours
latest_news.text: 86 currently hospitalized, 8 serious. 70 new arrivals in last 24h. Total 3,530 injured since war began. Fresh Iranian missile strikes overnight.

latest_news.headline: Iran arrests 10 foreigners for spying
latest_news.text: IRGC intelligence arrests 10 foreigners for alleged spying. Tightening internal security amid US-Israel strikes.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21 09:00) — Global war probability 100%. Day 21 of Iran war. US Embassy Baghdad struck by drones/rockets (2nd attack). Another tanker hit off UAE. Iranian missile 'metres' from Netanyahu's office. Israel deploys MORE troops to Lebanon — ground ops expanding. 70 Israelis hospitalized last 24h. IMO warns naval escorts can't guarantee safety. Iraq brokering Hormuz passage — first diplomatic track. Iran arrests 10 foreigners for spying. Oil above $100. Trump coalition effort failing. No de-escalation in any primary theater.
